type <<of question>> <<like this>> <<often appears>> <<in basic>> <<arithmetic tests>> <<where students>> <<must apply>> <<multiplication rules>>.

<<This method>> <<works well>> <<for any>> <<quantity of>> <<goods sold>> <<at a>> <<fixed price>> <<per unit>>.
